job_snippets: Design and implement robust backend services and APIs using modern frameworks and languages.
Develop and maintain database schemas, queries, and data models for high-performance applications.
Implement authentication and authorization systems with secure token management.
Build scalable microservices and serverless functions for distributed systems.
Optimize database performance through indexing, query optimization, and caching strategies.
Implement real-time features using WebSockets, Server-Sent Events, or message queues.
Design and implement RESTful and GraphQL APIs with proper error handling and validation.
Work with cloud platforms to deploy and manage backend infrastructure.
Implement automated testing for backend services including unit and integration tests.
Monitor application performance and implement logging and alerting systems.
Handle data processing pipelines and background job processing.
Implement security best practices including input validation, SQL injection prevention, and XSS protection.
Work with containerization and orchestration technologies for deployment.
Optimize application performance through profiling and bottleneck identification.
Implement rate limiting, throttling, and API versioning strategies.
Work with message queues and event-driven architectures.
Handle file storage and content delivery networks (CDN) integration.
Implement data backup and disaster recovery procedures.
Collaborate with frontend developers on API design and integration.
Stay current with backend technologies and contribute to technical innovation.
